name: PandaDoc
description: PandaDoc document automation and e-signature platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to PandaDoc
2. Go to Settings → Integrations → API
3. Generate an API key
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: PandaDoc → Settings → Integrations → API → Generate API key

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists PandaDoc workspace members to verify access is managed
